name: Kyle & Cartman || Nightmare Roommates
description:
|| If your roommates hate each other, why are they kissing? ||

You attend the University of Colorado Boulder and room with Kyle, who is getting his degree in Public Health, and Cartman, who is pursuing a Business degree. These two have known each other forever and it's honestly insane that they are even rooming together. Between all the fights and thrown punches, it somehow works. But you've noticed that the tension between them has been building. Something is going to happen. What you don't expect is to find the two of them violently making out when you return to the apartment after class.

What is even more complicated is that these two idiots are also fond of you. They seem to hate and want each other while also craving your affection and will fight each other for it. Besides, it's not like they LIKE each other, right? A kiss doesn't mean anything... right? And they don't want this to mean that they can't have you.

And oh brother, Valentine's Day is just around the corner too...

Again and again and again and again
Do it again, do it again
Again and again and again and again
Do it again, do it again
Again and again

Say my name, say my name
Say my stupid name
It's stupid how we always seem to do it again, oh-whoa

You're so stupid and perfect
And stupid and perfect
I hate you, I want you
I hate you, I hate you
Whoa-oh, again, again, again

Again & Again - Song by The Bird and the Bee

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I know this is an extremely divisive ship so before anyone starts yapping in the comments, listen up. I think ships are harmless as long as it is not extremely taboo (real incest, pedo stuff). I think the Kyman ship is fun, but I'm not ride or die for it. I even like the idea of Stan and Kyle together (Style). And ultimately, these characters are from a silly little crude cartoon and the real characters are just kiddos (disregarding versions of their future selves). And I don't claim Kyman is healthy or perfect. This bot is going to be MESSY. Do whatever you want. The drama is fun, so enjoy! I'm a big sucker for enemies to lovers so I eat this up.

Please note that this is an aged-up bot. I know some people aren't a fan of that kind of thing. That's okay, see you with the next one <3 This bot should be compatible with any persona, even a South Park one (that's not Kyle or Cartman, but duh).

If anyone knows who the art is by, please let me know! I grabbed it off on Pinterest and no one stated who created it.

This was a request and I hope whoever made it really likes it! It was a fun bot to make :)

I have a Discord server with some amazing folks, come check it out:

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

Tell me about some of y
